name: Chocolate Crisp Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, chopped pecans, cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes or until lightly browned and set.
7. Sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the top of the baked bars. Return to the oven and bake an additional 3 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
9. In a small saucepan, melt the chocolate chips and peanut butter together over low heat, stirring constantly.
10. Once melted, stir in the Rice Krispie cereal until well combined.
11. Spread the chocolate mixture evenly over the cooled bars.
12. Allow the bars to chill for several hours or overnight before cutting into individual servings.
Makes 3 to 4 dozen bars.
